name: Staffline Group plc
summary: Staffline Group plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides recruitment and outsourced human resource services, and skills training and probationary services in the United Kingdom. The company operates through three segments: Recruitment GB, Recruitment Ireland, and PeoplePlus. It provides labour solutions to the agriculture, drinks, food processing, manufacturing, e-retail, driving, and logistics sectors. The company also offers adult skills, adult and prison education, skills-based employability, and apprenticeship services, as well as health and well-being programs, and individual support services for carers and people with disabilities. The company provides its services to government and commercial sectors under the Staffline, Express, Vital, Brightwork, and Diamond Recruitment brand names. Staffline Group plc was founded in 1986 and is based in Nottingham, the United Kingdom.
